title: alcea angulata
intro: Alcea angulata, also known as the angled hollyhock or Chinese hollyhock, is a perennial plant species native to China and parts of Asia. The plant is known for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antibacterial properties, making it effective in treating various health conditions such as fever, rheumatism, and skin infections. The health benefits of Alcea angulata include its ability to reduce inflammation, alleviate pain, and improve immune function, making it a popular herbal remedy in traditional Chinese medicine. Alcea angulata is typically prepared as a decoction or infusion, and its herbal preparations often involve boiling the roots or flowers in water to create a medicinal tea or syrup.
